h3fe5ee5ag8ce3g4d8bg8e0bg24729db6dd31: The pain you suffer will cleanse you - do not fight it.
he372437dgacb8g434dg98edg29fa5f37eca4: That's it, dear child, do not fight it!
h23da5125g9177g4c9cgbd39ge65671edca30: Let the sting of flesh wash away your pain!
h4e5b36cagf327g4b01g9129g3b860228795a: Do not keep quiet, dear one. Let me hear you.
h9ed87803g3f62g441dgb39bgd1915a87f37f: Would you have joined up with her if you'd known she'd be indulging in this sort of thing, Astarion?
h0bc41680gb080g45cag9de6g201de3a5af7b: Would you have joined up with him if you'd known he'd be indulging in this sort of thing, Astarion?
h79295fbbgc9a6g42feg9dc2g9971724b62ec: Would you have joined up with them if you'd known they'd be indulging in this sort of thing, Astarion?
haeebcfdeg8cf3g4f6cg9363gfc3d833aaca7: I mean, I had my hopes.
hd35b7a68g8b8ag4cfbg88feg24201d135c74: Don't wear him out entirely, priest. I might have use for him yet.
h8beae683gee60g4d08g8de5g38f3611b5655: Don't wear her out entirely, priest. I might have use for her yet.
h057cc3c1gce80g4a8dg9f13gf93b3ba0da09: Don't wear them out entirely, priest. I might have use for them yet.
h66908457g28abg4d3dga75bg94eb3dbb4efd: I heard you, dear one. Whimper, cry, beg - let it all out!
h5a73d4bfged0cg4f0eg9356gd66ca723f7b9: Yelp loudly and dramatically beg for mercy.
he7170519g8a01g4f6egad8fga75f8c17e7bb: Your voice sounds so sweet, dear one. Keep going!
h0e8c2575g5f18g41beg87d1gcdcba6d06b74: Tch. Beg sincerely or don't beg at all!
h0e7df122g2009g4c13gab31ge02e0f95000e: Come on. A child can hit harder than that.
hf0e6c596gf275g4959ga31ag882c8c68f2f7: Hah! You want more? As you wish, dear one.
h7e979338gd195g4906gbc4aga1059d92b83b: You claim to want more, but I feel you flinching, dear one.
h3402064dgeefag44a0gbc67gd511c3c49a68: Slow your breathing to attain silence, inside and out.
hb32b7e92gb4b6g4faega83fg3664f92adcfd: Make a show of screaming on the top of your lungs.
hb4ee11cag51ebg4595g9b99g7eabfce66cb1: Do not keep quiet, dear child. Embrace it!
h10917302g97e7g46c1g9a99gc06564eb4825: Take a deep breath and close your eyes.
hcfce8403g7874g44bfga750g458e9273d5eb: Come now, child. Do not hold it in!
h2722c909g1eb1g4c00g94d1gf9ed6a0b80ee: My my. Who knew our friend had so much blood in them?
hffa98b7dg9561g4b61g833cg9605f381896f: Try not to lick your lips as you say that.
hdbc59f62gdf4dg49begbb6eg4af55c42ad0d: Better not let too much be spilled. As much as I'm enjoying the show, we may still need him afterwards.
hb6757e2fgeeb9g4801gaf88gc2afdbfba110: Better not let too much be spilled. As much as I'm enjoying the show, we may still need her afterwards.
h2d9f3a05gdeacg4c54gb0efg051393901450: Better not let too much be spilled. As much as I'm enjoying the show, we may still need them afterwards.
h94830737g5391g46f3g9086g692aa802ae7b: Not the worst technique, priest. Good wrist movement, lots of enthusiasm...
h7b7d4b54g0825g4e76g908fg510dd3e8e166: It was a fine strike. Excellent form!
hf8e8ef12gd500g4fb4g8ebeg98f1a899e5bf: Is that a moan I hear? Delightful.
ha2b1dea1gc869g4438g8f2ag3f951f14e093: Writhe in exaggerated agony and cry out.
hb283a584g5818g4a95g9d32g4bc6517eb9fa: That's it, dear one! Let Loviatar hear you!
ha12612fcg5df3g4c7fg9d0dgc68ec128d734: Come now, child. You can do better than that.
h66bacc52g0b10g49eag97d6gdc5b3013a548: You look tired. Should I take over?
h6ecc665eg782cg40ffg8cdeg8f3dc44cebec: Hah! Wonderful. You want more? I'll give it to you.
h463132fagd46fg47degb199gc33036b69642: Heh. You are shaking, dear one. And now is not the time for a brave face.
h7f5a8b98g0ef3g4cdaga3b6g9d55e77e34ea: Slow your heart and sink deeper into the stillness.
hfaf4e39bgf262g4a38g9efcgb5ba41a661e9: Howl at the PAIN, the AGONY of it all.
hf52ba70fg097eg4066g9568gfca19d5d5738: Pain is proof that we live! Revel in it.
h9ffa78bfgf105g44eag9459gcf4f5495af28: You are doing so well - do not give in now!
h70b14c05gb6bbg44f6gb398g7b4ebcf5435d: That's it! Welcome the pain. Let it become part of you!
hd5c48f8fgbe67g420egba4cg746a1f725f54: Do not mock the gifts you receive!
hd302d6f3gda8fg4c57ga306g4bd46190d775: So stoic, dear one. A pity.
hb786193fgb349g4cb7ga1cbgf9a785525442: You whimper so softly - so sweetly!
h09790fe0gc250g4fd4gadeeg29b462156620: Ah, mercy! I can't take it... it's too much!
h7db16634gd463g4d0fgbd8ag3905584d67fc: Yes you can, child. Take the pain and offer it up to Loviatar. Offer it all!
h3d94ab25g5476g49f3g9f2eg24ac4047ab1b: Such mockery only harms you, child.
h8fa1a825gbf92g4bd6g886ag119e8c6908b4: Hit me as hard as you can - or I'll return the favour.
h203627a5gf951g44cfgbd81gd31d7549af16: Hah! I hope that's a promise, dear one.
heab847fag329cg4110g8cbagb14ec7e8e164: Heh. Do not tease what you will not deliver, dear one.
he1bb0580g2680g424eg979eg3dc3e14e5044: Let the world recede. You neither hear the priest nor feel the blow.
h74033cb3ged3ag4754g991dgaaacc668c99f: Sing out in pain and pleasure. You've never felt so ALIVE.
h0ade63c5g9150g4eb6g9b30g9e6b5e8e7bb7: Offer your pain to Loviatar - and you shall be rewarded.
